summary:
Senior software engineer experienced in designing and shipping modern, fast products loved by millions of users every single day. Author of popular open-source tools (fff, odiff) and core collaborator on industry-leading projects including Material-UI, Cypress.io, React Native, and FFmpeg.

Leading expert in performance optimization for any kind of system: SIMD, GPU acceleration, native real-time processing pipelines, and distributed systems performance tuning. Applying AI tools at scale and implementing top-performing AI-native products. Passionate about shaping my own agentic AI toolset to produce the most qualified software solutions and amazing products for users.

employment.responsibilities: Founding engineer at a procurement-automation startup. Designed and built the core platform end-to-end: web app, backend, data pipelines, and infrastructure. Drove technical direction and deep product involvement.
Returned to Cypress to lead the launch of Component Testing.

projects.responsibilities: Author and lead architect of Cypress Component Test Runner (https://www.cypress.io/blog/2021/04/06/introducing-the-cypress-component-test-runner/). Designed the runtime, dev-server integration, and public API adopted by thousands of teams.

employment.responsibilities: Core collaborator & owner of date/time picker components with millions of weekly downloads. Drove accessibility, localization, and API design.
Shipped features across the Cypress test runner and dashboard: authoring, designing, and testing end-to-end product workflows used by millions of developers.
Full-stack JavaScript engineer and team lead. Owned architecture, delivery, and code quality across multiple client projects.

projects.responsibilities: Built front-end and back-end modules; designed matching and reporting subsystems.
Led front-end feature delivery and code review.

projects.idea: Slide-synced video playback for a video-hosting platform
projects.responsibilities: Designed and implemented the full application architecture.

projects.idea: Multi-platform chat-bot for workflow automation and reporting
projects.responsibilities: Designed and built the full system end-to-end.

projects.idea: Systems health monitoring and analytics platform
projects.responsibilities: Led the front-end sub-team; owned front-end architecture and contributed to back-end services.
Technical lead. Drove product architecture and delivery.

employment.responsibilities: Individual contributor to the large-scale, high-traffic web application for courier delivery.

ossProjects.name: fff
ossProjects.description: High-performance file search toolkit. Frecency-ranked results, sub-millisecond search across massive codebases. Used by millions people every day.

ossProjects.name: odiff
ossProjects.description: Fastest pixel-by-pixel image diffing tool. Powers millions of screenshot comparisons under the hood of every major visual regression testing pipeline.

ossProjects.name: Material-UI
ossProjects.description: Core contributor to Material-UI up to v5. Created and maintained date/time pickers. 80% react websites used by date picker at somet point.

ossProjects.name: Cypress
ossProjects.description: Author and lead architect of Cypress Component Testing. Core contributor to Cypress and a former employee of the company.

ossProjects.name: React Native
ossProjects.description: Maintained the status bar module for Android & iOS.

ossProjects.name: FFmpeg
ossProjects.description: Maintained the UDP streaming protocol: audio, video, and subtitles.

education.place: Kharkiv Computer and Technology College — Ukraine
